task.summary: Hints adjusted and new settings for battleships
EA movement fix vsEA mode reset button fix
new claude md changes and Battleships fix

Updated button styles and code cleanup
DAVID PUSH, more style generalisation that hopefully doesn't break anything
Maze experiment mode update generate random on edit mode
Evolution Replay for maze game adjustments
Seeded RNG for peakfinder and mahzegame
